questions.q: What NHL team did the Montreal Canadiens defeat in Game 7 overtime to advance to the 2026 Eastern Conference final?

options: Canada-U.S. Permanent Joint Board on Defence
questions.correctText: Canada-U.S. Permanent Joint Board on Defence
